title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA6-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6 |writer=[[Russ Manning]] |penciller=*[[Russ Manning]] *[[Brian Snoddy]] *[[Rick Hoberg]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Eric Shanower]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[January 3]], 1995{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53785/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_6|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #6}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]As Han Solo is working for Jabba the Hutt in "[[The Second Kessel Run]]," the story must fall between [[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]] and [[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]], as Jabba has forgiven Solo's debt during this period; as both issues are dated to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] by ''[[The Essential Chronology]]'', so is "The Second Kessel Run." |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=6 }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6''' was the sixth issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''A peaceful scientist has created a device capable of turning a planetary wasteland into a paradise, but the Empire has exactly the opposite in mind! Luke Skywalker and Han Solo encounter the scientist's stowaway daughter on board the ''Millennium Falcon'', and before they know it, they are swept along in a desperate race to catch up with the climate-altering spaceship, which has left a trail of damaged planets in its wake!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 6
THE SECOND KESSEL RUN |text=A scientist has created a device that can turn a wasteland into a verdant paradise, but Luke Skywalker and Han Solo find that the Empire has exactly the opposite in mind...}} ==Contents== *"[[The Second Kessel Run]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6}} ===Cover gallery=== File:ClassicStarWarsEarlyAdventures6CC.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA6-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53785/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_6|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #6}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 6 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|06|Early Adventures 06]]
